data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of personalization variables (name, time, provider, location, custom fields) within the system. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or state checks that confirm the existence or functionality of these variables. This lack of evidence indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the expected result was not met.
gaps: No evidence of implementation or retrieval of personalization variables (name, time, provider, location, custom fields).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
